vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-558: Auto-update mechanism for Electron app

narratives.Problem: When users run `npx panopticon`, they get the version published to npm, not the latest. No auto-update mechanism exists for installed desktop app copies.
narratives.Proposal: Implement electron-updater with GitHub Releases as the update server. App checks for updates on startup and every 4 hours. Downloads update in background. Prompts user via Help menu to restart and apply. Stable channel only for v1.

narrative.Action: Add `electron-updater` package to `apps/desktop/package.json` dependencies via `bun add electron-updater`.

Update `apps/desktop/package.json` build.publish config with GitHub repository owner/repo and artifact formats (AppImage, dmg, nsis). This tells electron-builder where to publish and enables electron-updater to find release metadata.

Create `apps/desktop/src/updater.ts` module. Initialize auto-updater with `setFeedURL({ provider: 'github', owner: 'eltmon', repo: 'panopticon-cli' })`. Call `checkForUpdates()` on app startup and every 4 hours via `setInterval`. Handle `update-available`, `download-progress`, `update-downloaded`, and error events. Export functions for manual check and quit-and-install.

subItems.title: App detects new version on startup (automatic check)
Downloads update in background without blocking UI

narrative.Action: Add IPC channels in `apps/desktop/src/main.ts` for renderer to query update state: `update-status` (returns {checking, available, downloaded, version}), `check-for-updates` (triggers manual check), `quit-and-install` (triggers restart). Wire auto-updater events to send status to renderer via `webContents.send()`.

items.title: Add Check for Updates to Help menu

narrative.Action: Update `apps/desktop/src/menu.ts` Help submenu to add 'Check for Updates…' item that triggers `checkForUpdates()` via IPC to main process. After update is downloaded, dynamically show 'Install Update and Restart' item in Help menu.

subItems.title: Prompts user to restart when update is ready

items.title: Update release workflow to build and attach desktop artifacts

narrative.Action: Modify `.github/workflows/release.yml` to: (1) install desktop app dependencies before build, (2) run `npm run build:desktop` to produce Electron packages via electron-builder, (3) use `softprops/action-gh-release` with `assets: [glob pattern]` to attach the built `.AppImage`, `.dmg`, `.exe` artifacts to the GitHub Release. electron-updater requires artifacts attached to the release to download them.

Confirm that root `package.json` version and `apps/desktop/package.json` version stay in sync. Both should update together on release since root version propagates to workspaces via the workspace protocol.
